name: Save £5 Today
description: Add £5 to your savings today to build a daily habit.
purpose_statement: Small, consistent deposits are the key to building an emergency fund without feeling the pinch.

name: Save £20 Today
description: Challenge yourself to set aside £20 in your savings before the day ends.
purpose_statement: Stepping up your daily saving amount accelerates your progress towards bigger financial goals.

name: Save £1 Today
description: Add £1 to your savings right now.
purpose_statement: Micro-saving proves that you can always find a little bit of money to pay your future self.

name: Complete 2 Lessons
description: Make strong progress by finishing two lessons today.
purpose_statement: Tackling multiple lessons in one sitting helps you connect financial concepts faster.

name: Clear 5 Reviews
description: Complete 5 items in your exercise review queue.
purpose_statement: Reviewing past material ensures you actually retain the financial strategies you've learned.

name: Clear 10 Reviews
description: Knock out 10 items from your review queue today.
purpose_statement: Spaced repetition is the best way to master complex topics like investing and crypto.

name: Save £50 This Week
description: Stash away a total of £50 in your savings before the week ends.
purpose_statement: Setting an achievable weekly savings target keeps you accountable and builds a predictable wealth trajectory.

name: Save £200 This Week
description: Push your limits and save £200 over the course of the week.
purpose_statement: Aggressive savings weeks give your investment portfolios more capital to grow over time.

name: Complete 3 Lessons
description: Finish 3 lessons in your personalized learning path this week.
purpose_statement: Steady, weekly educational progress is the foundation of long-term financial literacy.

name: Complete 5 Lessons
description: Power through 5 lessons across any of your active courses.
purpose_statement: Immersing yourself in the material helps you conquer challenging subjects like Forex or Real Estate.

name: Clear 10 Weekly Reviews
description: Complete 10 exercise reviews this week to keep your skills sharp.
purpose_statement: Regularly clearing your review queue stops you from forgetting critical budgeting and investing rules.

name: Clear 20 Weekly Reviews
description: Master your past material by clearing 20 review items this week.
purpose_statement: Extensive retrieval practice transforms short-term knowledge into lifelong financial intuition.

name: Save £2 Today
description: Add £2 to your savings today.
purpose_statement: Building the muscle memory of saving is more important than the amount when you are first starting out.

name: Clear 3 Reviews
description: Refresh your memory by answering 3 quick review questions.
purpose_statement: A tiny bit of daily review prevents you from forgetting important financial concepts without taking up your whole day.

name: Save £8 Today
description: Set aside £8 in your savings before you go to sleep.
purpose_statement: Swapping out a small daily impulse purchase for savings helps your emergency fund grow effortlessly.

name: Finish 1 Lesson
description: Dive into your personalized path and complete a single lesson.
purpose_statement: Spending just 5 minutes a day on financial education compounds your knowledge immensely over a year.

name: Clear 7 Reviews
description: Tackle 7 questions from your review queue to solidify your learning.
purpose_statement: Consistent practice ensures your new skills in budgeting and investing become second nature.

name: Save £15 Today
description: Add £15 to your savings today.
purpose_statement: Regular mid-sized contributions create a strong buffer against unexpected life events.

name: Save £25 This Week
description: Add £25 to your savings over the next seven days.
purpose_statement: Setting a highly achievable weekly goal builds your confidence as an active saver.

name: Complete 2 Lessons
description: Find time this week to finish at least two lessons.
purpose_statement: Maintaining a relaxed but steady pace prevents burnout while you learn to manage your money.

name: Clear 15 Reviews
description: Answer 15 review items correctly by the end of the week.
purpose_statement: Spreading your practice throughout the week leads to deeper long-term retention of financial rules.

name: Save £75 This Week
description: Add £75 to your savings this week.
purpose_statement: Scaling up your weekly savings rate brings you substantially closer to your major life goals.

name: Complete 4 Lessons
description: Work through four lessons in your learning paths this week.
purpose_statement: Dedicating a few days a week to learning dramatically improves your financial decision-making.

name: Conquer 1 Path
description: Complete one full learning path this week.
purpose_statement: Finishing a comprehensive topic gives you a holistic understanding of how that specific financial system works.

name: Skip a Treat, Save £3
description: Add £3 to your savings instead of buying a small daily luxury.
purpose_statement: Redirecting minor everyday expenses into your savings builds wealth effortlessly over time.

name: Quick Brain Teaser
description: Answer just 2 review questions to keep your mind sharp today.
purpose_statement: Micro-learning sessions prevent the forgetting curve from wiping out your hard-earned progress.

name: Level Up Today
description: Complete a single lesson in your personalized learning path.
purpose_statement: Expanding your financial vocabulary one step at a time makes complex topics highly manageable.

name: Daily Wealth Wisdom
description: Read today's featured finance fact on the dashboard.
purpose_statement: Discovering a new piece of trivia daily broadens your perspective on the broader economic world.

name: Stash a Tenner
description: Add £10 to your savings before midnight.

name: Memory Polish
description: Complete 4 pending exercises from your review queue.

name: Trivia Master
description: Read 5 daily financial facts by the end of the week.

name: Weekend Saver
description: Add £40 to your savings over the course of the week.
purpose_statement: Trimming a bit from your weekend entertainment budget significantly boosts your long-term reserves.

name: Journey Complete

name: The £100 Milestone
